category_sources: Official Mono repository describes Mono as an open source ECMA CLI, C#, and .NET implementation.
source_facts.description identifies Mono as a cross-platform open source .NET development framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mono; official Mono Project pages and repository use Mono.
docs_sources: Official Mono Project documentation site is dedicated documentation; official repository README also documents building and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Mono GitHub README and WineHQ news state WineHQ took over Mono upstream on WineHQ GitLab at gitlab.winehq.org/mono/mono.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says cross-platform .NET development framework; official repository describes ECMA CLI, C#, and .NET implementation.
